monitor_the_situation.title: US Airstrike Hits School in Tehran, Kills Nearly 200
— S4 · Conflict · Tehran, Iran · 2h ago. A US airstrike struck a school in Tehran, killing nearly 200 children and adults, according to CNN sources, amid ongoing US strikes on Iran.
US Airstrikes Hit Iranian Air Defenses and IRGC Speedboats in Southern Iran After Hormuz Attacks
Iran Launches Anti-Ship Missiles at US Navy in Persian Gulf
— S3 · Conflict · Persian Gulf · 44m ago. Iran reportedly launched anti-ship cruise missiles towards US Navy vessels in the Persian Gulf, escalating tensions in the region.
US Revokes License for Iranian Oil Sales After Hormuz Attacks
